title: Demi Gods Rising
description: Conquer The World With Demi Gods
body:
required mods:

player animator

pehkui

better combat

cloth config

 

this was mostly created for my server lore so there is no obtainment yet other than /give this mod dosent have a creative bar since as i said it was made for lore next version will have obtainment for servers that dont want to make this lore powers this mod includes Merlin from troll hunters and his staff with some of his spells 

 

to get started do command /give demigods:melrin or something like that and right click that item to use most of spells put one of the item like levitation in off hand and the magic staff in main hand and to use spells like shrink put shrink item in off hand and magic staff in main hand then punch entity you want to shrink

 

this was also created cause i couldn't find proper troll hunters mod that adds Merlin 

 

made by Placki/malpa0
